violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. - Dry storage room is needing maintenance. There is a crack along the tiled floor where there is an inch gap in some areas. Posses a tripping hazard. - Also, a small leak in the dry storage room along one of the walls. Coming in from piping that goes outside. Not bad now but is more obvious when it rains.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
